narrative:
Tallmadge 2-A (precinct in Summit County) has 1,156 registered voters, with 54.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.8%, a modest Republican lean of 3.7 percentage points.
